title: Emergency Tracking Hardening
summary: Tightened emergency tracking state, action eligibility, route ownership, and tracking-sheet UI resilience for the staging release.

changes.message: Centralized tracking stage, hero, and action decisions so ambulance, bed, pending, arrived, delayed, lost, and completed states stay aligned.
Scoped live route and tracking UI state by request identity so a new emergency request cannot inherit stale ETA, route, progress, or title-animation state.
Kept Contact Dispatch available during recoverable tracking interruptions while preserving completed-state terminal behavior.
Added pure tracking model assertions and hardened tracking-sheet text rendering for staging verification.
